# Digi Agency

> AI-powered digital marketing tools for small business marketing teams and freelancers.
> Six specialist AI agents covering content creation, SEO, social media, video,
> on-page optimisation, and a general marketing assistant.

## What is Digi Agency?

Digi Agency is a SaaS platform built like a virtual marketing agency — each tool is
powered by a specialist AI agent. The name reflects the product experience: instead of
hiring an agency, you get an AI-powered team of specialists built into one platform.

Built on Google Gemini 2.5 Flash with real-time Google Search grounding, each agent
delivers structured, multi-step workflows rather than a blank prompt box.

## Tools

- **Content Team**: Research audience and search demand, generate content briefs, write
  full SEO-optimised blog articles (800-1200 words) in a practitioner voice
- **Social Team**: Analyse social profiles, identify content opportunities, build
  30-day social media calendars with platform-native post copy (LinkedIn, X, Instagram)
- **SEO Audit**: Technical crawl of any URL, competitive gap analysis using live search
  data, prioritised action plan, and implementation of copy fixes
- **Video Director**: Shot-by-shot video production breakdowns with AI generation prompts
  compatible with tools like Runway Gen-4
- **On-Page Optimiser**: Analyse existing page copy against SEO best practices, research
  competitor pages, and rewrite copy with embedded optimisations
- **AI Assistant**: Multi-turn marketing assistant for drafting emails, summarising
  documents, building briefs, and answering marketing strategy questions

## Integrations

- **Notion**: All outputs save directly to the user's connected Notion workspace.
  Databases are auto-provisioned on first setup.
- **Google Search**: Research-based agents use real-time Google Search grounding for
  accurate, current recommendations rather than relying solely on training data.

## Pricing

- **Starter** — £29/month: Limited monthly outputs per tool. All tools except Video Director.
- **Pro** — £49/month: Unlimited usage across all six tools. Single seat.
- **Agency** — £149/month: Unlimited usage, 5 team seats with join-request management
  and a shared workspace. Designed for small teams.

## Who It's For

Small businesses with an in-house marketing team that doesn't have the budget to hire an
external agency. Freelance digital marketers looking to scale their output and streamline
client work. Anyone who wants specialist AI marketing tools without learning six different
platforms.

- Sign up / Pricing: https://www.digi-agency.co.uk/login
